scripts.dev:reset: adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081 && adb -s emulator-5554 shell am force-stop com.rahulparmar.offlineotpshield && adb -s emulator-5554 shell am start -n com.rahulparmar.offlineotpshield/.MainActivity
scripts.dev:reset:wireless: adb -s 192.168.0.180:42497 reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081 && adb -s 192.168.0.180:42497 shell am force-stop com.rahulparmar.offlineotpshield && adb -s 192.168.0.180:42497 shell am start -n com.rahulparmar.offlineotpshield/.MainActivity
scripts.sms:fake:otp:hdfc: adb -s emulator-5554 emu sms send HDFC "Your OTP is 455612 for transfer request"
scripts.sms:fake:otp:amazon: adb -s emulator-5554 emu sms send AMAZON "Use code 882211 to confirm your sign in"
scripts.sms:fake:promo:swiggy: adb -s emulator-5554 emu sms send SWIGGY "Hungry? Flat 60% OFF up to 120. Use code YUMMY60 today"
scripts.sms:fake:promo:myntra: adb -s emulator-5554 emu sms send MYNTRA "Mega Sale Live: Extra 40% OFF on fashion. Limited time offer"
scripts.sms:fake:promo:paytm: adb -s emulator-5554 emu sms send PAYTM "Cashback Alert! Recharge now and get up to 100 cashback. TnC apply"
scripts.sms:fake:promo:all: pnpm sms:fake:promo:swiggy && pnpm sms:fake:promo:myntra && pnpm sms:fake:promo:paytm
scripts.sms:fake:all: pnpm sms:fake:otp:hdfc && pnpm sms:fake:otp:amazon && pnpm sms:fake:promo:all
scripts.apk:debug: expo prebuild -p android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: expo prebuild -p android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
